description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 첨단 회로의 공생을 시각적으로 탐구한 작품으로, 데이터가 주입된 광합성을 통해 디지털 생태계에 적응한 생명체의 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visionary exploration of the symbiosis between organic botany and high-tech circuitry, where life-forms adapt to a digital ecosystem through data-infused photosynthesis.

prompt: Macro photography of a translucent bioluminescent flower with fiber-optic veins, glowing neon circuits pulsing through its petals, floating holographic pollen particles, deep obsidian background with digital matrix rainfall, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave color palette of cyan and magenta.
